label: Order Entry
description: Buy/sell order form with side, quantity, price, strategy linking, and pre-trade constraint validation.

0.7.note: Form renders with defaults; isBatchMode disables submit and shows message.

0.8.note: contextError guard renders rose-400 error text. Submit errors handled via FormWidget/useFormSubmit.

0.9.note: Removed unused Target and Zap lucide imports.

1.3.note: organizationIds drives isContextComplete — org filter gates order submission.

1.4.note: clientIds drives isContextComplete — client filter gates order submission.

1.5.note: strategyIds filters STRATEGIES list and maps instrument selection.

1.6.note: Empty strategyIds returns all strategies in dropdown.

1.7.note: STRATEGIES from lib/strategy-registry; DEFAULT_INSTRUMENTS in hook (acceptable location).

l1.notes: L1 pass. Scope filtering directly gates order submission via isContextComplete.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails.

3.1.note: Modes: live ✓ (order submission enabled), batch ✓ (submit button disabled, advisory message shown), paper — expected same as batch (read-only form).

3.2.note: isBatchMode=context.mode==='batch' propagated from use-terminal-page-data.ts through TerminalData to widget. Widget disables submit and shows amber advisory.

3.5.note: Paper mode expected: submit button disabled (same as batch guard). Paper mode not yet in UI toggle — document only.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in order-entry-widget.tsx itself. Form state is UI-only.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human checks 3.3(verify submit disabled in batch)/3.4(batch indicator visible) required.

4.1.note: Buy/Sell toggle, order-type tabs, size percentage buttons, submit button all have onClick handlers wired to context setters. No dead buttons.

4.6.note: isContextComplete computed via useMemo in use-terminal-page-data.ts (not on every render).

l4.notes: All agent checks pass. Human checks 4.3(form completeness)/4.4(submit produces order)/4.7(collapsible constraints)/4.8(form scrolls) required.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all STRATEGIES registry entries — strategy dropdown includes all registered strategies. Archetype-based side auto-selection: longArchetypes→buy (BASIS_TRADE, YIELD, DIRECTIONAL, ML_DIRECTIONAL, MOMENTUM, RECURSIVE_STAKED_BASIS), shortArchetypes→sell (MEAN_REVERSION). HUF execution mode warns against market orders.

l5.notes: 5.1 complete. Human checks 5.2–5.6 required — this is the primary execution widget and most critical for strategy execution readiness.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 follows L5 human sign-off.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl in widget file. CLEAN.

7.3.note: 231 lines — within 500-line limit. No single function >200 lines.

7.4.note: OrderEntryWidget PascalCase, useTerminalData/useFormSubmit hooks useCamelCase, file kebab-case. CLEAN.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function. CLEAN.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file. CLEAN.

l7.notes: L7 pass. All mechanical checks clean.

8.1.note: text-[10px] → text-micro at lines 107, 120, 153, 177, 181, 204, 226; text-[9px] → text-nano at lines 134 and 184 (Badge). Tokens now available in globals.css @theme.

8.3.note: Uses Card, Button, Input, Badge, Select, Tabs, Collapsible from components/ui/*. Excellent shared primitive adoption.

8.4.note: Agent: no img, price/size inputs have adjacent label elements (text-[10px] labels at lines 107/120/153). No interactive div without role. Human: keyboard form navigation required.

8.5.note: Human check required — responsive at minW=2, minH=3.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (tokens applied). 8.2/8.3 clean. 8.4(agent) clean — labels present. Human 8.4+8.5 required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Order entry is a singleton form that must be independently resizable and visible alongside order book and price chart.

relationships.notes: Singleton — only one instance allowed per terminal layout. Driven by selectedInstrument and selectedAccount from instrument-bar. Strategy linking cross-couples with strategies domain.

dataContract.notes: Reads live price from TerminalData context (WS-updated). Order submission via placeMockOrder() in mock mode; production path via order management REST API. Own trades synced from mock-trade-ledger on mock-order-filled window event.

gaps: DeFi-specific order params (gas limit, slippage tolerance) not in form
Strategy constraints collapsible only shows archetype+executionMode — full constraint set not displayed
coverage.notes: Most critical widget for strategy execution readiness (L5). DeFi execution may require additional form fields not currently present.

knownIssues: DEFAULT_INSTRUMENTS fallback in use-terminal-page-data.ts rather than lib/constants/ — minor L1.7 placement gap
isLoading and error stubbed as false/null pending real API hook wiring
DeFi order params (slippage, gas) absent from order form

findings.description: order-entry-widget.tsx — ~15 user-visible strings not i18n wrapped
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: order-entry-widget.tsx:107,120,134,153,177,181,204,226 — text-[10px]/text-[9px] arbitrary typography classes with no matching globals.css token
findings.deferReason: missing token — requests --text-micro (0.625rem/10px) and --text-nano (0.5625rem/9px) for dense form labels and percentage buttons
findings.fix: globals.css @theme now exposes --text-micro and --text-nano; widget updated to text-micro at lines 107, 120, 153, 177, 181, 204, 226 and text-nano at lines 134, 184.
